name: @lokiyou/pi-nano-footer
description_en: Lightweight powerline-style footer for Pi Coding Agent that shows model, thinking level, directory, MCP status, context usage, tokens, and cost while keeping the built-in Working indicator.
description_zh: Pi Coding Agent 的轻量级 powerline 风格页脚，显示模型、思考级别、目录、MCP 状态、上下文使用量、token 和成本，同时保持内置的 Working 指示器。
